revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-3-060

Scanning in which the required variations in beam direction are produced by variations in phase or amplitude (or both) of the currents in the elementary antennas.

Reference: B.S.

{{IALAFooter}}
